title: Listening gist phrases
subtitle: React to audio or a podcast.
overview: You do not need every word to summarize gist.
Use entendí que and hablaban de.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I did not understand all the details.

items.es: Entendí que la conversación era sobre viajes.
items.en: I understood that the conversation was about travel.

items.es: Hablaban de un problema en el aeropuerto.
items.en: They were talking about a problem at the airport.

items.es: No entendí todos los detalles, pero entendí la idea principal.
items.en: I did not understand all the details, but I understood the main idea.

items.es: La persona dijo que había perdido su maleta.
items.en: The person said that he/she had lost his/her suitcase.

items.es: Creo que al final encontró ayuda.
items.en: I think that in the end he/she found help.
